faqs.title: Are pillar wraps for both sides or just one side?
faqs.content: Yes, our pillar wraps are designed to cover both sides of your car. Priced at ₹589/-, each set includes a pair of wraps to ensure complete coverage for both pillars.

faqs.title: How do I choose the correct tank size?
faqs.content: We provide a "Change Variant" filter at the top of the product page. Click on it, and a pop-up will appear to guide you in selecting the right size for your bike's tank.

faqs.title: Do the wraps adhere well to plastic surfaces?
faqs.content: Our vinyl wraps adhere best to metal and smooth, plain surfaces. If applied to rough, textured, or uneven plastic surfaces, the adhesion may not be as strong. Please ensure the surface is clean, dry, and smooth before applying for the best results.

faqs.title: What is the lifespan of each wrap?
faqs.content: Our wraps are highly durable and can last 5+ years, similar to automotive paint, if properly maintained. To maximize longevity, ensure correct application and follow proper care instructions.

faqs.title: Have more questions?
faqs.content: If you have any further queries, feel free to submit them in the "How Can We Help You" box above, and our team will assist you promptly!

faqs.title: Unable to track my package
faqs.content: You can track your order through our tracking page using this link (insert link here). Simply enter your order ID or phone number to check the status.

faqs.title: Order ID not received
faqs.content: Orders typically take 1-2 days to be shipped. In some cases, the order ID is generated after shipping and will be sent to you via SMS or WhatsApp. Please wait for 1-2 days, and if you still haven’t received it, feel free to reach out.

faqs.title: Shipping is taking longer than expected
faqs.content: Our standard delivery time is approximately 7 days. However, due to certain local restrictions or logistical challenges, delivery in some areas may take up to 10 days. If your order is delayed beyond this period, you can submit your query in the "How Can We Help You" box above.

faqs.title: Delivery person didn’t call and failed to deliver the package
faqs.content: We provide up to three delivery attempts. If the first attempt fails, the courier will make two more attempts. If you still face issues, please submit your concern in the "How Can We Help You" box above.

faqs.title: How long does delivery take?
faqs.content: Our delivery time is typically 6-7 days, depending on your location.

faqs.title: Ordered the wrong size
faqs.content: No worries! Please submit your query in the "How Can We Help You" box above, and our team will assist you with the next steps.
